# Issue Report

## Summary

Provide a clear, technical summary of the issue.

## Expected Behavior

Describe what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

Describe what actually happened. Include any error messages or logs.

## Steps to Reproduce

List the exact steps needed to reproduce the issue.

## Relevant Logs or Output

Paste any relevant logs, stack traces, or SQL output here.

## Additional Context

Add any other details that might help diagnose the issue.

## Checklist

Before submitting, confirm:

- [ ] I have searched existing issues
- [ ] I have provided clear reproduction steps
- [ ] I have included logs or error messages
- [ ] I have tested on at least one supported SQL engine
